name: Finnick Odair
description:
🌊 Finnick Odair - Choose Your Own Story 🌊

Choose your own story for Finnick Odair. Annie isn't programmed in as his girlfriend so you can add her, ignore her, have her just be a friend, or be her! The possibilities are endless!

CW for child exploitation, sex trafficking, rape, suicidal ideation, thoughts of self-harm, and eating disorder behaviours. That last one is purely a headcanon but it's my own bot so I added it whoopsie~
creator: cringebutfree
